executives.name: Daniel Dickinson
executives.background: Managing Partner of HCI Equity Partners.

executives.name: Rex Geveden
executives.background: Mr. Geveden has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of BWXT since 2017. He joined the company in 2015 as Chief Operating Officer. Previously, he was Executive Vice President at Teledyne Technologies Incorporated.
